scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -rn assets mobileview dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && npx terser script.js -c -m -o dist/script.js && npx clean-css-cli style.css -o dist/style.css && npx html-minifier --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true index.html -o dist/index.html
